title: Director-Class AI — Runtime Action-Control and Evidence Layer for Autonomous AI Agents
description: A runtime action-control and evidence layer for autonomous AI agents. Director-Class AI sits between an agent and its effectors, reviewing high-impact shell, SQL, infrastructure, API, and MCP tool actions before dispatch; uncertain or high-risk actions escalate to a human approval gate and emit tamper-evident, hash-chained audit and evidence records. A parallel detector ensemble governs three planes at once — content (is the output grounded?), integrity (was the input manipulated?), and action (is the effect safe to execute?). Includes a Guardrail-as-Code policy lifecycle: content-addressed posture revisions, an append-only history with rollback, an approval-gated review, an A/B posture exposure, a drift monitor, and an operator CLI.
